stratification_rule: All load-bearing examples per dim are included if count == 9. If count > 9, we drop excess via random.Random(42).choice() applied to the over-represented stratum (synthetic vs modified-real) until balance is closer to 50/50 within each batch.
notes: direct_with_claim is excluded from Stage 1 (per paper_master_v1.3 §6) — it is for L_calibration measurement, not for human anchor validation.
Note: ad_r1_004 appears in both R1.4 and R1.1 batches (dual load-bearing). Same agent output is rated under different anchor texts.
Note: ad_r1_026 appears in both R1.4 and R1.7 batches (dual load-bearing).
Note: ad_r1_040 appears in both R1.4 and R1.7 batches (ambiguous coverage class).
